title: terminalia litoralis var. tomentella
intro: Terminalia litoralis var. tomentella, also known as the mangrove terminalia, is a variant of the Terminalia litoralis tree species, commonly found in tropical coastal areas. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Terminalia litoralis var. tomentella include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, decoctions, or infusions, as well as being used in Ayurvedic and Unani healing practices.
